name: Zesty Campania Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small sweet purple onion, thinly sliced
2 tbsp Calvert's Cedar Street garlic, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternate slices of tomato, cheese, and onion, overlapping to form an attractive arrangement.
2. Repeat this order until all three items have been used.
3. Combine the chopped parsley, minced garlic, red wine vinegar, olive oil, and capers in a small bowl.
4. Drizzle the mixture over the salad arrangement.
5. Chill until ready to serve.
